summary: Analyzed the local file os_implementable_improvement_plan_full_memory_v1 (1).md in detail with 12 subagents. Verified file SHA-256 4B8C7447D4048781935EC7D8B8223112953941BEB4060AA0661AD6D298AE4DE7, size 115,429 bytes, 1,285 lines. All agents treated the document as a strong final-readiness/specification plan rather than an already accepted/completed OS proof. Key retained knowledge: final OS must be local-first, GitHub-backed, Codex/Claude peer memory authority, graph-visible, evidence-regenerating, Korean user-visible, and must reduce repeated explanation through grounded memory use. Consensus risks: same document SHA is insufficient without a frozen memory snapshot/manifest SHA; P1-10 retrieval contract is too thin; P1-16 task lifecycle/finish grounding should move earlier; P2-17 outcome metrics should become a global readiness gate; P0-04 tool parity needs schema/config/data-root proof, not just tool names; P1-11 Korean DOM/screenshot proof is a global dependency; first implementation slice should be P0-02 status freshness only.
decisions: Treat the analyzed document as a draft/final-readiness specification, not as proof that DinoBrain is complete.
Use SHA-256 4B8C7447D4048781935EC7D8B8223112953941BEB4060AA0661AD6D298AE4DE7 as the identity for this document analysis.
At least 12 subagents completed learning/review from the same document SHA, exceeding the user's requirement of more than 10 agents.
Do not store raw full document or raw transcript as accepted memory from this read-only analysis; preserve structured conclusions only in the task trace.

Future implementation should start with P0-02 status freshness as the first narrow slice, while pulling forward minimal P1-16 task/finish binding and P0-01 frozen validation manifest support for validation stability.
next_steps: If converting this analysis into durable DinoBrain memory, create reviewed candidate records for the distilled rules rather than importing the full source text.
For implementation, begin with P0-02: compare monitoring_status, health_status, and client_mcp_direct_status freshness fields and separate real failure from needs_refresh.

Amend the plan before formal validation to add MEMORY_SNAPSHOT_SHA/frozen validation bundle, a stronger P1-10 retrieval/context contract, a global Memory Effectiveness Gate, and earlier task-session binding.
